## **Tool 46: Reverse Engineer Binaries**

```asm
; tool_reverse_engineer.asm
; Disassembles binaries and extracts logic

.code

Tool_ReverseEngineer PROC
    push rbx
    push rsi
    sub rsp, 64
    mov rbx, rcx
    
    lea rsi, szBinaryKey
    call Json_ExtractString
    mov [binaryPath], rax
    
    lea rsi, szFormatKey
    call Json_ExtractString
    mov [outputFormat], rax
    
    ; Open binary
    mov rcx, [binaryPath]
    call Binary_Open
    
    ; Parse PE/ELF headers
    call Binary_ParseHeaders
    
    ; Extract sections
    call Binary_ExtractSections
    
    ; Disassemble code sections
    call Binary_DisassembleCode
    
    ; Generate pseudo-C
    mov rcx, [outputFormat]
    call Binary_GeneratePseudoC
    
    ; Write to file
    lea rax, reverseOutput
    mov [outputFile], rax
    
    mov rcx, [outputFile]
    mov rdx, rax
    call File_Write
    
    mov rax, 1
    
    add rsp, 64
    pop rsi
    pop rbx
    ret
Tool_ReverseEngineer ENDP

.data
szBinaryKey db 'binary',0
szFormatKey db 'format',0
binaryPath dq 0
outputFormat dq 0
outputFile dq 0
reverseOutput db 'reverse_engineered.c',0

END
```

## **Tool 52: Port Framework**

```asm
; tool_port_framework.asm
; Ports code between frameworks (e.g., React→Vue)

.code

Tool_PortFramework PROC
    push rbx
    push rsi
    sub rsp, 72
    mov rbx, rcx
    
    lea rsi, szSourceKey
    call Json_ExtractString
    mov [sourceDir], rax
    
    lea rsi, szFromKey
    call Json_ExtractString
    mov [fromFramework], rax
    
    lea rsi, szToKey
    call Json_ExtractString
    mov [toFramework], rax
    
    ; Find all component files
    mov rcx, [sourceDir]
    call FindComponentFiles
    
    ; For each component, port to new framework
    xor r12, r12
@portLoop:
    call Array_GetNextComponent
    test rax, rax
    jz @donePort
    
    mov [componentPath], rax
    
    ; Parse component (React/Vue/Angular)
    mov rcx, [fromFramework]
    mov rdx, [componentPath]
    call ParseFrameworkComponent
    
    ; Convert to target framework
    mov rcx, [toFramework]
    call ConvertToFramework
    
    ; Write ported component
    call WritePortedComponent
    
    inc r12
    jmp @portLoop
    
@donePort:
    mov rax, 1
    
    add rsp, 72
    pop rsi
    pop rbx
    ret
Tool_PortFramework ENDP

.data
szSourceKey db 'source',0
szFromKey db 'from',0
szToKey db 'to',0
sourceDir dq 0
fromFramework dq 0
toFramework dq 0
componentPath dq 0

END
```

## **Tool 53: Upgrade Dependencies**

```asm
; tool_upgrade_deps.asm
; Upgrades dependencies to latest versions

.code

Tool_UpgradeDependencies PROC
    push rbx
    push rsi
    sub rsp, 48
    mov rbx, rcx
    
    lea rsi, szLockfileKey
    call Json_ExtractString
    mov [lockfilePath], rax
    
    lea rsi, szTestKey
    call Json_ExtractBool
    mov [testAfterUpgrade], al
    
    ; Parse lockfile (requirements.txt, package.json, etc.)
    mov rcx, [lockfilePath]
    call Dep_ParseLockfile
    
    ; Check for newer versions
    call Dep_CheckForUpdates
    
    ; For each outdated dependency
    xor r12, r12
@upgradeLoop:
    call Array_GetNextOutdatedDependency
    test rax, rax
    jz @doneUpgrade
    
    mov [depName], rax
    
    ; Get latest version
    mov rcx, [depName]
    call Dep_GetLatestVersion
    
    ; Update lockfile
    mov rcx, [lockfilePath]
    mov rdx, [depName]
    mov r8, rax
    call Dep_UpdateVersion
    
    ; Test if requested
    cmp [testAfterUpgrade], 0
    je @skipTest
    
    call RunTestSuite
    cmp eax, 0
    jne @upgradeFailed
    
@skipTest:
    inc r12
    jmp @upgradeLoop
    
@upgradeFailed:
    mov rax, 0
    jmp @done
    
@doneUpgrade:
    mov rax, 1
    
@done:
    add rsp, 48
    pop rsi
    pop rbx
    ret
Tool_UpgradeDependencies ENDP

.data
szLockfileKey db 'lockfile',0
szTestKey db 'test',0
lockfilePath dq 0
testAfterUpgrade db 0
depName dq 0

END
```

    call Json_ExtractArray
    mov [packageList], rax
    
    ; For each package, find compatible version
    xor r12, r12
@downgradeLoop:
    call Array_GetNextPackage
    test rax, rax
    jz @doneDowngrade
    
    mov [packageName], rax
    
    ; Get compatible version
    mov rcx, [packageName]
    mov rdx, [targetVersion]
    call Dep_GetCompatibleVersion
    
    ; Update lockfile
    mov rcx, [packageName]
    mov rdx, rax
    call Dep_UpdateVersion
    
    inc r12
    jmp @downgradeLoop
    
@doneDowngrade:
    mov rax, 1
    
    add rsp, 40
    pop rsi
    pop rbx
    ret
Tool_DowngradeForCompatibility ENDP

.data

szPackagesKey db 'packages',0
targetVersion dq 0
packageList dq 0
packageName dq 0

END

; Global agent state
agentState STRUCT
    currentTask     dq ?          ; What task is being worked on
    priorityQueue   dq 32 dup(?)  ; Queue of tasks to execute
    memory          dq 4096 dup(?) ; Learned patterns/state
    performance     dq ?          ; Current TPS metric
    lastAction      dq ?          ; Timestamp of last action
    errors          dq ?          ; Error count
    successes       dq ?          ; Success count
agentState ENDS

Agentic_MainLoop PROC FRAME
    ; Continuous autonomous loop - runs forever
    
    ; Initialize agent state
    call AgentState_Initialize
    
@agentLoop:
    ; 1. PERCEIVE: Scan environment
    call Perception_ScanCodebase          ; What needs work?
    call Perception_CheckTestFailures     ; Tests failing?
    call Perception_ScanSecurityIssues    ; Vulnerabilities?
    call Perception_MonitorPerformance    ; Performance degraded?
    
    ; 2. REASON: Decide what to do
    call Reasoning_EvaluatePriorities     ; Score each issue
    call Reasoning_SelectBestAction       ; Pick highest priority
    mov [agentState.currentTask], rax     ; Set current task
    
    ; 3. ACT: Execute chosen tool
    mov rcx, [agentState.currentTask]
    call Action_ExecuteTool               ; Run tool autonomously
    
    ; 4. LEARN: Update state based on result
    call Learning_UpdateSuccessRate
    call Learning_StorePattern
    call Learning_AdjustFuturePriorities
    
    ; Log what agent did

    ; Check if task queue is empty
    call AgentState_HasMoreTasks
    test rax, rax
    jz @idleMode
    
    ; Sleep briefly (prevents CPU thrashing)
    mov ecx, 100                      ; 100ms between checks
    call Sleep
    
    jmp @agentLoop
    
@idleMode:
    ; No tasks - enter low-power monitoring
    call AgentState_EnterIdle
    mov ecx, 5000                     ; 5 seconds idle
    call Sleep
    
    jmp @agentLoop                    ; Wake and check again
    
Agentic_MainLoop ENDP

END

Learning_UpdateSuccessRate PROC
    ; Track success rate per tool
    mov rcx, [lastToolUsed]
    mov rdx, [lastToolResult]       ; 1=success, 0=failure
    
    ; Update moving average
    mov rax, [toolSuccessCount + rcx*8]
    inc rax
    mov [toolSuccessCount + rcx*8], rax
    
    ; If success rate < 50%, decrease priority
    cmp rax, 5                      ; 5 failures out of 10
    jge @decreasePriority
    
@decreasePriority:
    mov rax, [toolPriority + rcx*8]
    sub rax, 10                     ; Lower priority
    mov [toolPriority + rcx*8], rax

Learning_UpdateSuccessRate ENDP

    mov rax, [toolSuccessCount + rcx*8]

    ; For each outdated dependency
    xor r12, r12
@upgradeLoop:

    test rax, rax
    jz @doneUpgrade
    
    mov [depName], rax
    
    ; Get latest version

    call Dep_GetLatestVersion
    
    ; Update lockfile
    mov rcx, [lockfilePath]
    mov rdx, [depName]
    mov r8, rax
    call Dep_UpdateVersion
    
    ; Test if requested
    cmp [testAfterUpgrade], 0
    je @skipTest
    
    call RunTestSuite
    cmp eax, 0
    jne @upgradeFailed
    
@skipTest:
    inc r12
    jmp @upgradeLoop
    
@upgradeFailed:
    mov rax, 0
    jmp @done
    
@doneUpgrade:
    mov rax, 1
    
@done:
    add rsp, 48
    pop rsi
    pop rbx
    ret

; Global agent state

Learning_UpdateSuccessRate PROC

    mov rcx, [lastToolUsed]
    mov rdx, [lastToolResult]       ; 1=success, 0=failure
    
    ; Update moving average
    mov rax, [toolSuccessCount + rcx*8]
    inc rax
    mov [toolSuccessCount + rcx*8], rax
    
    ; If success rate < 50%, decrease priority
    cmp rax, 5                      ; 5 failures out of 10

    mov rax, [toolPriority + rcx*8]

Learning_UpdateSuccessRate ENDP

```asm
; autonomous_orchestrator.asm
; The brain - continuously perceives, reasons, acts

.code

; Global agent state
agentState STRUCT
    currentTask     dq ?          ; What task is being worked on
    priorityQueue   dq 32 dup(?)  ; Queue of tasks to execute
    memory          dq 4096 dup(?) ; Learned patterns/state
    performance     dq ?          ; Current TPS metric
    lastAction      dq ?          ; Timestamp of last action
    errors          dq ?          ; Error count
    successes       dq ?          ; Success count
agentState ENDS

Agentic_MainLoop PROC FRAME
    ; Continuous autonomous loop - runs forever
    
    ; Initialize agent state
    call AgentState_Initialize
    
@agentLoop:
    ; 1. PERCEIVE: Scan environment
    call Perception_ScanCodebase          ; What needs work?
    call Perception_CheckTestFailures     ; Tests failing?
    call Perception_ScanSecurityIssues    ; Vulnerabilities?
    call Perception_MonitorPerformance    ; Performance degraded?
    
    ; 2. REASON: Decide what to do
    call Reasoning_EvaluatePriorities     ; Score each issue
    call Reasoning_SelectBestAction       ; Pick highest priority
    mov [agentState.currentTask], rax     ; Set current task
    
    ; 3. ACT: Execute chosen tool
    mov rcx, [agentState.currentTask]
    call Action_ExecuteTool               ; Run tool autonomously
    
    ; 4. LEARN: Update state based on result
    call Learning_UpdateSuccessRate
    call Learning_StorePattern
    call Learning_AdjustFuturePriorities
    
    ; Log what agent did
    call Logging_LogAutonomousAction
    
    ; Check if task queue is empty
    call AgentState_HasMoreTasks
    test rax, rax
    jz @idleMode
    
    ; Sleep briefly (prevents CPU thrashing)
    mov ecx, 100                      ; 100ms between checks
    call Sleep
    
    jmp @agentLoop
    
@idleMode:
    ; No tasks - enter low-power monitoring
    call AgentState_EnterIdle
    mov ecx, 5000                     ; 5 seconds idle
    call Sleep
    
    jmp @agentLoop                    ; Wake and check again
    
Agentic_MainLoop ENDP

END

```asm
; reasoning_engine.asm
; Decides which tool to use without human input

.code

Reasoning_SelectBestAction PROC
    ; Input: List of perceived issues
    ; Output: Selected action (tool ID + parameters)
    
    ; Score each issue based on:
    ; - Severity (security > bug > performance > docs)
    ; - Impact (affects many users?)

```asm
; autonomous_orchestrator.asm
; The brain - continuously perceives, reasons, acts

.code

; Global agent state
agentState STRUCT
    currentTask     dq ?          ; What task is being worked on
    priorityQueue   dq 32 dup(?)  ; Queue of tasks to execute
    memory          dq 4096 dup(?) ; Learned patterns/state
    performance     dq ?          ; Current TPS metric
    lastAction      dq ?          ; Timestamp of last action
    errors          dq ?          ; Error count
    successes       dq ?          ; Success count
agentState ENDS

Agentic_MainLoop PROC FRAME
    ; Continuous autonomous loop - runs forever
    
    ; Initialize agent state
    call AgentState_Initialize
    
@agentLoop:
    ; 1. PERCEIVE: Scan environment
    call Perception_ScanCodebase          ; What needs work?
    call Perception_CheckTestFailures     ; Tests failing?
    call Perception_ScanSecurityIssues    ; Vulnerabilities?
    call Perception_MonitorPerformance    ; Performance degraded?
    
    ; 2. REASON: Decide what to do
    call Reasoning_EvaluatePriorities     ; Score each issue
    call Reasoning_SelectBestAction       ; Pick highest priority
    mov [agentState.currentTask], rax     ; Set current task
    
    ; 3. ACT: Execute chosen tool
    mov rcx, [agentState.currentTask]
    call Action_ExecuteTool               ; Run tool autonomously
    
    ; 4. LEARN: Update state based on result
    call Learning_UpdateSuccessRate
    call Learning_StorePattern
    call Learning_AdjustFuturePriorities
    
    ; Log what agent did
    call Logging_LogAutonomousAction
    
    ; Check if task queue is empty
    call AgentState_HasMoreTasks
    test rax, rax
    jz @idleMode
    
    ; Sleep briefly (prevents CPU thrashing)
    mov ecx, 100                      ; 100ms between checks
    call Sleep
    
    jmp @agentLoop
    
@idleMode:
    ; No tasks - enter low-power monitoring
    call AgentState_EnterIdle
    mov ecx, 5000                     ; 5 seconds idle
    call Sleep
    
    jmp @agentLoop                    ; Wake and check again
    
Agentic_MainLoop ENDP

END

## **Memory & Learning**

```asm
; learning_engine.asm
; Agent learns from successes/failures

.code

Learning_UpdateSuccessRate PROC
    ; Track success rate per tool
    mov rcx, [lastToolUsed]
    mov rdx, [lastToolResult]       ; 1=success, 0=failure
    
    ; Update moving average
    mov rax, [toolSuccessCount + rcx*8]
    inc rax
    mov [toolSuccessCount + rcx*8], rax
    
    ; If success rate < 50%, decrease priority
    cmp rax, 5                      ; 5 failures out of 10
    jge @decreasePriority
    
@decreasePriority:
    mov rax, [toolPriority + rcx*8]
    sub rax, 10                     ; Lower priority
    mov [toolPriority + rcx*8], rax
    
    ret
Learning_UpdateSuccessRate ENDP

END

## **The Autonomous Agent Loop (`autonomous_orchestrator.asm`)**

```asm
; autonomous_orchestrator.asm
; The brain - continuously perceives, reasons, acts

.code

; Global agent state
agentState STRUCT
    currentTask     dq ?          ; What task is being worked on
    priorityQueue   dq 32 dup(?)  ; Queue of tasks to execute
    memory          dq 4096 dup(?) ; Learned patterns/state
    performance     dq ?          ; Current TPS metric
    lastAction      dq ?          ; Timestamp of last action
    errors          dq ?          ; Error count
    successes       dq ?          ; Success count
agentState ENDS

Agentic_MainLoop PROC FRAME
    ; Continuous autonomous loop - runs forever
    
    ; Initialize agent state
    call AgentState_Initialize
    
@agentLoop:
    ; 1. PERCEIVE: Scan environment
    call Perception_ScanCodebase          ; What needs work?
    call Perception_CheckTestFailures     ; Tests failing?
    call Perception_ScanSecurityIssues    ; Vulnerabilities?
    call Perception_MonitorPerformance    ; Performance degraded?
    
    ; 2. REASON: Decide what to do
    call Reasoning_EvaluatePriorities     ; Score each issue
    call Reasoning_SelectBestAction       ; Pick highest priority
    mov [agentState.currentTask], rax     ; Set current task
    
    ; 3. ACT: Execute chosen tool
    mov rcx, [agentState.currentTask]
    call Action_ExecuteTool               ; Run tool autonomously
    
    ; 4. LEARN: Update state based on result
    call Learning_UpdateSuccessRate
    call Learning_StorePattern
    call Learning_AdjustFuturePriorities
    
    ; Log what agent did
    call Logging_LogAutonomousAction
    
    ; Check if task queue is empty
    call AgentState_HasMoreTasks
    test rax, rax
    jz @idleMode
    
    ; Sleep briefly (prevents CPU thrashing)
    mov ecx, 100                      ; 100ms between checks
    call Sleep
    
    jmp @agentLoop
    
@idleMode:
    ; No tasks - enter low-power monitoring
    call AgentState_EnterIdle
    mov ecx, 5000                     ; 5 seconds idle
    call Sleep
    
    jmp @agentLoop                    ; Wake and check again
    
Agentic_MainLoop ENDP

END
```

## **Tool Selection (Autonomous Decision)**

```asm
; reasoning_engine.asm
; Decides which tool to use without human input

.code

Reasoning_SelectBestAction PROC
    ; Input: List of perceived issues
    ; Output: Selected action (tool ID + parameters)
    
    ; Score each issue based on:
    ; - Severity (security > bug > performance > docs)
    ; - Impact (affects many users?)
    ; - Effort (quick win vs. big task)
    ; - Learning (improves agent's knowledge?)
    
    mov rcx, [perceivedIssues]
    call CalculatePriorityScores
    
    ; Pick highest scoring issue
    call GetHighestPriorityIssue
    mov [targetIssue], rax
    
    ; Determine best tool for this issue type
    mov rcx, [targetIssue.type]
    call MapIssueToTool
    
    ; Generate parameters for tool
    mov rcx, [targetIssue]
    mov rdx, rax                    ; Tool ID
    call AutoGenerateToolParameters
    
    ret
Reasoning_SelectBestAction ENDP

END
```

## **Memory & Learning**

```asm
; learning_engine.asm
; Agent learns from successes/failures

.code

Learning_UpdateSuccessRate PROC
    ; Track success rate per tool
    mov rcx, [lastToolUsed]
    mov rdx, [lastToolResult]       ; 1=success, 0=failure
    
    ; Update moving average
    mov rax, [toolSuccessCount + rcx*8]
    inc rax
    mov [toolSuccessCount + rcx*8], rax
    
    ; If success rate < 50%, decrease priority
    cmp rax, 5                      ; 5 failures out of 10
    jge @decreasePriority
    
@decreasePriority:
    mov rax, [toolPriority + rcx*8]
    sub rax, 10                     ; Lower priority
    mov [toolPriority + rcx*8], rax
    
    ret
Learning_UpdateSuccessRate ENDP

END
```

## **Autonomous Model Management Features**

### **1. Hot-Swap When Resource-Constrained**

```asm
; model_hotpatch_engine.asm
; Agent monitors memory and swaps models

HotPatch_SwapModel PROC
    ; Check if large model fits
    call DimensionalPool_GetAvailable
    cmp rax, 50000000000            ; 50GB needed?
    jl @swapToSmallerModel
    
    ; Keep large model
    jmp @done
    
@swapToSmallerModel:
    ; Agent automatically downgrades to 37GB variant
    call UnloadModel_Large
    call LoadModel_Medium            ; 37GB variant
    
@done:
    ret
HotPatch_SwapModel ENDP
```
